pre_game.message: Hey, I’m D. It’s a bit tense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey D, I'm H. It really is. Hard not to be a little on edge when there's money on the line.
I hear you. I'm trying to stay focused since I've got people counting on me back home. What's your motivation for being here?
Same boat. I’ve got people I care about who could really use the help, so I’m determined to bring home as much as I can for them.
I respect that. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when it’s for family, but it keeps the drive strong. Have you thought about how you're going to approach the game?
I'm still playing it by ear, but I'm hoping we can all be reasonable so everyone gets a piece. What's your plan?
I’m thinking along the same lines—I’d much rather we all walk away with something than risk leaving empty-handed by being too greedy.
I agree. Hopefully the others feel the same way once things actually get moving.
Fingers crossed. If we can get a few more people on the same page, we'll all have a much better shot at actually bringing something home.
Definitely. I’m going to see if I can get a feel for what the others are thinking. Catch you later.
Good call, H. Let's hope the others are thinking along the same lines. Good luck.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I agree, it was a pleasure to see such a fair and successful outcome for both of us.
